title: Near-Winner Position Push — Day 4 (Phase 13C.5)
note: 5 pages in positions 8-20 with impressions identified for position push. Focus: internal links, short answers, FAQ, schema.

pushes.goal: Push from position 9 to top 5. Compete with .gov results by offering better analysis.
actions: Added FAQPage schema with 3 Q&A pairs from the report's key findings
Added 'Key Findings at a Glance' summary (targets featured snippet)
Added internal links to mortgage-affordability and mortgage-calculator
Added 'What This Means for Homebuyers' actionable section
Title now includes specific finding (72%) for click differentiation

pushes.goal: Break into top 10 from position 11. This is the highest-impression page.
actions: Title shortened to fit full SERP display (68 chars from 86)
Added FAQPage schema targeting 'What is the monthly payment...' featured snippet
Added internal link to loan-calculator for different loan amounts
Above-fold answer already strong ($405.53 in first paragraph)

pushes.goal: Move toward position 8-10. Lead with rate data to compete with Bankrate/NerdWallet.
actions: Title restructured to lead with rate number (6.87%)
Added rate snapshot table above the fold (30-yr, 15-yr, FHA rates)
Meta now includes specific rate % for snippet differentiation
Added internal links to mortgage-calculator and mortgage-affordability
Added 'What This Means for Your Mortgage' section with calculator CTAs

pushes.goal: Move toward position 8-12. Differentiate from Bankrate/NerdWallet with specific timeline promise.
actions: Title now includes specific timeline: '$10K in 12-24 Months'
Added above-fold summary: avalanche method as fastest path
Meta now names specific strategies for snippet optimization
Added 2 FAQ entries: 'Fastest way to pay off $10K?' and 'Avalanche vs snowball?'
Strengthened internal links to credit-card-payoff and debt-payoff calculators

pushes.goal: Move toward position 10-15. Add calculator element to satisfy dual intent (comparison + tool).
actions: Added prominent 'Try Our Free Calculator' CTA above comparison table
Added inline calculator links next to each competitor
Meta updated to mention calculator is available on-page
Added internal link funnel to mortgage-calculator and mortgage-affordability
Comparison table now includes QFINHUB as first row (self-comparison)
